_comment: Alpha mission 1, drone 3, same strip x=[6,9) y=[0,8) as the SAFE example. One cell (7, 4) at p_contact=8500 simulates a confirmed-contact detection (≥ p_min=7000). Coverage + time + strip-bounds all still satisfied, so this isolates the FAIL_DETECTION outcome — the contract will set verdict=UNSAFE and fail_reason=2.
